tasks.title: Set up Telegram bot with long polling, command routing, and inline keyboard handling (§1 Architecture)
Implement SQLite schema for users, messages, projects, tasks, decisions, risks, follow-ups, patterns, and summaries (§2 Data model)
Build rules engine + NLP fallback for message categorization (§1, §4.2)
Implement inline categorization buttons and message assignment flow (§4.2, §4.3)
Generate and schedule weekly executive summary with patterns and stats (§4.8, §3.7)
Implement 60s cron job for overdue follow-up notifications (§4.7)
Create project CRUD flows with task/decision/risk linking (§4.5, §4.6)
Export all user data as JSON (§4.9, Acceptance Note 4)
Implement STT/OCR failure recovery and input validation (§5 Edge cases, Acceptance Note 7)
